name: Defense Protocol
short_description: Do you have the resources and upgrades you need to leave the planet in this roguelike genre where you try to defend your base, survive, gather the necessary resources, and upgrade your technology while trying to repair your spaceship on an uncharted planet you crash-landed on?
detailed_description: Defend your base against waves of savage alien attacks on an unexplored planet where you make an emergency landing and try to repair your spaceship, collect resources from different parts of the planet to obtain new tech modules, choose between the right tech modules to leave the planet and repair your spaceship and save it from this barren planet experience this roguelike genre with unique stylized graphics
about_the_game: Defend your base against waves of savage alien attacks on an unexplored planet where you make an emergency landing and try to repair your spaceship, collect resources from different parts of the planet to obtain new tech modules, choose between the right tech modules to leave the planet and repair your spaceship and save it from this barren planet experience this roguelike genre with unique stylized graphics
